turns.text_ai:
Be My AI:Yes, the cooking instructions are visible. Here they are:

Five Cheese Bacon Macaroni Cooking Instructions:

For best results, prepare in conventional oven. Do not prepare in toaster oven.

Conventional Oven:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Remove tray from carton. Do not remove or pierce film.
3. Place tray on a baking sheet on the center rack in the oven.
4. Cook for 60-65 minutes. Place tray on a baking sheet on the center rack in the oven.
5. Carefully remove from oven and remove film. Stir thoroughly.
6. Let stand for 1-2 minutes before serving.

Microwave - 1100 Watts:
1. Remove tray from carton. Do not remove or pierce film.
2. Place tray in the microwave.
3. Cook on high for 7 minutes.
4. Carefully remove film and stir contents. Replace film and cook on high for an additional 3-4 minutes.
5. Let stand for 1-2 minutes before serving.

Caution: Steam can be released when removing film. Product will be hot.

Be My AI:October 30, 2024

[PII removed] Below please find the results of the recent audiologic evaluation for your patient, [PII removed]. If I can provide any additional assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me.

AUDIOLOGICAL EVALUATION

HISTORY: [PII removed] was referred for an audiological evaluation in an effort to determine whether or not his hearing has deteriorated further. Interim otologic history is unremarkable. The patient is concerned his hearing has decreased since his last evaluation with us.

CLINICAL FINDINGS:
Ears: Pinna is of normal configuration, external auditory canals are free of trauma and debris, and all tympanic membrane landmarks are clearly visualized.

Auditory Assessment: The pure-tone air and bone conduction audiogram, spondee thresholds, and speech recognition scores revealed no evidence of further deterioration in this patient's auditory sensitivity. Spondee thresholds and speech recognition scores are stable. Immittance measures are consistent with a mobile, intact tympanic membrane bilaterally. Quick Speech in Noise Testing revealed a mild binaural deficit. Distortion Product Otoacoustic Emissions were recorded from 1 through 10 kHz at 4 points per octave. Refer to the audiogram form to determine whether the responses were present or absent. This cochlear mapping will determine the site of lesion.

IMPRESSIONS: There is no evidence of further deterioration in the patient’s auditory sensitivity. Approximately 40 minutes were spent on this visit: >30 minutes face to face patient/family clinical assessment, disease state and symptom education, goals of treatment discussion, coordination of care and general and complex communication strategies. All of the patient’s questions were answered.

RECOMMENDATIONS: I have asked [PII removed] to contact this center should he suspect a further decline in his auditory sensitivity.

Sincerely,
